Node.js v25.2.1

**To reproduce:** Run the following command from the project root:
```bash
cd playground/filemaker-removal-requirements && node playground.js __preflight__
```
reproduction_steps: Review failed checks and remediation attempts above
Fix the underlying issues (server not running, code not deployed, etc.)

resolution.solutionApplied: Created tsconfig.json and typescript.ts files to satisfy ts-node's module resolution requirements in the playground directory. The devFlow tool was attempting to execute the playground.js script through ts-node, which expected TypeScript configuration files that didn't exist in this JavaScript-only project.
